content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.53% with VIX +2.95% to 17.11 signals risk-off undertone, but specialty chem (SRF +10%, NAVIN), IT (COFORGE +15.6%), pharma (LUPIN +3.8%, WOCKPHARMA), capital goods (POLYCAB +9%, GRSE +5%, HAL +3.9%) and FMCG (MARICO, PIDILITIND) showing strong post-Q4 stock-specific moves. Book is +1.47% on day with 13 holdings — focus is risk management on existing winners rather than new admits. Deployment 67% with 14 names is already cluster-heavy (3 chem, 3 financials, 2 pharma, 2 cap goods).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1064.67,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.4% unrealized, SL 1064.67 already locks ~+8.2% gain (above entry 984). CMP 1076.70, SL gap 1.1% — within 1% trail-floor (Rule 14d). Holding SL/target as-is; further trail into 1075 would breach trail-gap discipline. Thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, RBI rate-cut tailwind, GNPA 0.93%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, -0.4% unrealized. SL 121 below entry — below trail trigger threshold. Hold as portfolio hedge given VIX +2.95%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.8%, SL 4725.56 already above entry 4575 (locks ~+3.3%). CMP 4790, SL gap 1.35% — meets trail-gap floor. May 14 board meeting (Q4 results) is a binary catalyst within 4 sessions — borderline but outside the 3-session Rule-11 window. Will reassess on Day-21 if event moves into 3-session window; for now SL placement caps tail. No-op MODIFY: keeping levels — actually this is no change, switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.9%, SL 6960 above entry 6900 (locks small gain). CMP 7043, SL gap only 1.18% — at trail-floor. Q4 already printed (PAT +124%), thesis intact, sector momentum strong (SRF +10% read-through). No additional trail; risk capped tightly."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.2%, CMP 365.50 just above SL 365.00. Per Rule 17, CMP-near-SL is NOT a valid EXIT rationale. Q4 PAT +31%, lending +32%, fundamentals intact. Let SL do its job; if it fires, -1% loss as designed. Original SL placement absorbs intraday wobble."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.3%, SL 822 just above entry 820 (breakeven+). CMP 830.60, SL gap 1.05% — at trail-floor. Holding levels (no-op effectively). Q4 PAT +18%, India volume +9%, intl +19% CC. Switching to HOLD to avoid no-op MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.0% unrealized, SL 1329.47 locks +5.6% above entry 1259. CMP 1351.20, SL gap 1.6% — meets trail-floor. Q4 INR rev +35.9%, EBIT margin +370bps, FY27 guidance >20.5%. Strong momentum (+15.6% today). Holding SL/target — this is a no-op; converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, SL 2998 below entry 3025. CMP 3062.50, SL gap 2.1%. Per Rule 14b, +2% trigger to move SL to entry not yet hit cleanly — keeping SL at 2998 to allow normal volatility. Defense thesis intact (Antique TP 3141, FY26 PAT +41.8%)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.4%, SL 827.41 already above entry 806 (locks +2.7%). CMP 842.60, SL gap 1.8% — meets trail-floor. Q4 record revenue, RTA duopoly leader. Holding levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, CMP 1481.20, SL 1445 (gap 2.4%). Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310bps — strong fundamental print. Today's move +8.6% partly reversed but thesis intact. Hold to original SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.2%, CMP 2433.20, SL 2400 (gap 1.4%). Q4 PBT +115%, US sales +46%, Glycerol Phenylbutyrate USFDA approval. Per Rule 17, do not pre-empt SL on intraday wobble — strong fundamentals support hold to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, near breakeven. SL 1580 (gap 2.2%). Q4 turnaround (loss to +Rs 164cr PAT, EBITDA margin 20.3%). Promoter pledge / debt are noted overhangs but Q4 print is already in. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, CMP 2782, SL 2700 (gap 3%). Today +10.27% on Q4 results — entered at top of move. SL placement allows normal post-breakout pullback. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.2%, CMP 9103.50, SL 8800 (gap 3.3%). Today +9.19% post fresh 52w high on record Q4 (rev +27%, PAT +32%). Hold to SL; strong cap-goods leader."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1064.67, "reasoning": "SL already locks +8.2%. Trail any tighter would breach 1% gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, normal range."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4725.56, "reasoning": "SL locks +3.3%; May 14 board meeting outside 3-session window for now."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "SL locks small gain; Q4 already printed bullish."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 365.00, "reasoning": "CMP near SL but Q4 fundamentals strong; let SL do its job."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 822.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+; FMCG defensive bid."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1329.47, "reasoning": "SL locks +5.6%; strong momentum continues."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2998.00, "reasoning": "+1.4% — below firm trail trigger; thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 827.41, "reasoning": "SL locks +2.7%; Q4 record revenue."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1445.00, "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +37%; original SL absorbs intraday."},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2400.00, "reasoning": "Strong Q4; do not pre-empt SL."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround printed; near breakeven."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2700.00, "reasoning": "Just entered post-breakout; SL allows pullback."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 8800.00, "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high; SL gives breathing room."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walking through BULLISH watchlist candidates (Rule 18 admit-side audit): (1) FINCABLES — duplicate of POLYCAB cap-goods cluster, already hold; reject on cluster-cap. (2) TATATECH — held no signal beyond volume; not actionable. (3) GABRIEL — auto components rally, but BHARATFORG order already OPEN in same cluster; reject on cluster-cap. (4) LAURUSLABS — pharma cluster already at LUPIN+WOCKPHARMA; reject on cluster-cap. (5) THERMAX — cap goods cluster (POLYCAB+HAL+GRSE), would push cluster too heavy; reject. (6) BHARATFORG — existing OPEN order at 2015 (CMP likely well above), pending order may be stale — leaving alone for now, will cancel if still OPEN tomorrow at unfavorable price. (7) HFCL OPEN MIS BUY at 133.50 placed 3282 minutes (~55 hours) ago — STALE intraday order, MIS cannot carry overnight. CANCEL. (8) NH, RAMCOCEM, KPIL, TITAGARH — no compelling break above the 13 names already held; deployment 67% leaves only ₹136K headroom (~13% capital), insufficient for full-size new entry without trimming.",
  "portfolio_notes": "13 CNC holdings, deployment 67%. Cluster check: Chemicals 3 (NAVIN+SRF+PIDILIT) ~12% capital, Financials 3 (PNBHOUSING+ABCAPITAL+CAMS) ~21%, Cap Goods 3 (HAL+GRSE+POLYCAB) ~12%, Pharma 2 (LUPIN+WOCKPHARMA) ~9%. All within sector caps. Day P&L +1.47% with 9 winners, 4 losers — book is healthy. HFCL stale MIS order needs cancellation (placed 55hrs ago, MIS cannot survive overnight). Risk management is the priority today; admit-side bar is high given near-full deployment."
}
